title: Luffy Wants the Kraken
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Brook, Coribou, Caribou, Franky, Luffy. The core story beat is luffy wants the kraken.
scene: The scene centers on luffy wants the kraken, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Brook, Coribou, Caribou, Franky, Luffy driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What did you just say, Luffy?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's take that big octopus and have him pull our ship!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't be Stupid!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look a bit closer!!! Heck, you don't even have to look close to see the size of that thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't know how many hundreds of years it must have been alive... but the kraken is a legendary monster that shows up in stories all across the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: "The boneless beast"... "The bodies Bones"... it's almost like looking at a counterpart of myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who cares?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm!! You're pretty good at that!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, this isn't something you see every day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're sketching it?!!! How laid-back are you?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's all very well saying that... but do you have a strategy, Luffy...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The problem is that we're underwater...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, no, no... the problem is the size of that thing, Luffy!! It could murder us in or out of the water!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Set a course due south!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Nami!! We should be heading for the octopus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't be ridiculous!! Take a look at the ships it's holding!! Do you want to end up like that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now, now, Nami-san!! I'm here to - bmmphrghh! - to protect you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He held it innn!!! Good going, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It must be thanks to the rehabilitation and the coat Nami's wearing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's wrong with these people?!!! In a situation like this... shouldn't they all be concentrating on fleeing for their lives?!!! I've gotta do something, or I'll be doomed along with this whole ship!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: Big bro dudee!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Masa AaaA AAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: something's approaching from the rear!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's...!!! the ship from before!

dialogue.speaker: Caribou
dialogue.text: Coribou Wuu!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: My glorious crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Have you come back to save Meee??!!

dialogue.speaker: Coribou
dialogue.text: We're!! Gonna!! Save!! Big bro dude!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh- huh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Uh- huh!!! We're gonna save him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mooo good Ooo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaghh HH...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: crunch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Guaa Aaaa haha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MOO DOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Nqua AaaAH H!!!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It destroyed the bubble coating!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It crushed a ship bigger than the sunny in an instant!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaAA RGH!!!! My MEE EEEN!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They look like jellyfish.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ShadDup, RORONOA!!!

summary: Luffy Wants the Kraken. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
